title: BABY CARRIER AND INFANT CARRIER
abstract: A carrier for an infant, the carrier including: a band adapted to surround the hips of a wearer, the band joined to a rear panel along a rear panel lower side, the rear panel adapted to be worn on the back of the wearer, a first restraining strap joined to and extending between a left shoulder region of the rear panel and a right side of the rear panel, a second restraining strap joined to and extending between a right shoulder region of the rear panel and a left side of the rear panel, the first and second restraining straps collectively defining a support sling, the support sling being configured to support the infant against the front of the wearer's body, the sling defining a first sling side for receiving the left leg of the infant there over, a second sling side for receiving the right leg of the infant there over, an upper sling side for receiving the infant's head there above, and a cover portion adapted to cover and support at least a portion of the infant's body and also cover at least a portion of the sling.
claims: Claims THE CLAIMS DEFINING THE INVENTION ARE AS FOLLOWS: 1 . A carrier for an infant, the carrier including: a band adapted to surround the hips of a wearer, the band joined to a rear panel along a rear panel lower side, the rear panel adapted to be worn on the back of the wearer, a first restraining strap joined to and extending between a left shoulder region of the rear panel and a right side of the rear panel, a second restraining strap joined to and extending between a right shoulder region of the rear panel and a left side of the rear panel, the first and second restraining straps collectively defining a support sling, the support sling being configured to support the infant against the front of the wearer's body, the sling defining a first sling side for receiving the left leg of the infant there over, a second sling side for receiving the right leg of the infant there over, an upper sling side for receiving the infant's head there above, and a cover portion adapted to cover and support at least a portion of the infant's body and also cover at least a portion of the sling. 2. A carrier according to claim 1 , wherein the band is formed from a first elasticized material. 3. A carrier according to claim 2, wherein the first and second restraining straps are formed from a second elasticized material. 4. A carrier according to claim 3, wherein the second elasticized material is an elasticized cotton material. 5. A carrier according to claim 3 or 4, wherein the second elasticized material has a greater degree of elasticity than the first elasticized material. 6. A carrier according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the cover portion is joined to and extends between the left side and right side of the rear panel. 7. A carrier according to claim 6 when dependent directly or indirectly on claim 3, wherein the cover portion is formed of the second elasticized material. 8. A carrier according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the band includes a first end and a second end, and a releasable fastener for releasably fastening the first end to the second end. 9. A carrier according to claim 8, wherein the releasable fastener is an adjustable fastener, enabling the band to fit a range of wearer dimensions. 10. A carrier according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the rear panel is formed from a substantially non-elasticized material. 1 1 . A carrier according to claim 10, wherein the non-elasticized material is a cotton fabric. 12. A carrier according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the first restraining strap is joined to each of the left shoulder region and the right side of the rear panel in a gathered configuration, and the second restraining strap is joined to each of the right shoulder region and left side of the rear panel in a gathered configuration. 13. A carrier according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the first and second restraining straps are disposed between the cover portion and the rear panel. 14. A carrier substantially as herein described and illustrated.
